content.json: ## Alert Aggregations: Streamlined Security Intelligence

## Importing CSV Data into Watchlists

This workbook requires you to import two CSV files into specific Watchlists:
1. [**CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1.csv**](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Corelight/Watchlists/Corelight-AggregationsEnrichment/CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1.csv) ->  CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1 Watchlist
2. [**CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2.csv**](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Corelight/Watchlists/Corelight-AggregationsEnrichment/CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2.csv) -> CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2 Watchlist

## Import Process
- Navigate to Microsoft Sentinel
- Access the Watchlists section
- Select the appropriate Watchlist (**CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1** or **CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2**)
- Choose **Update watchlist** -> **Bulk update**
- Upload the corresponding CSV file
- Proceed through **Next: Review + create**
- Finalize by clicking **Update**

Repeat these steps for both Watchlists to ensure all data is properly imported.

parameters.name: ImpactScore
parameters.label: Impact Score
parameters.query:
corelight_suri_aggregations
| mv-expand sid
| where ('*' == ('{Entity}') or (array_index_of(orig_h,('{Entity}')) != -1) or (array_index_of(resp_h,('{Entity}')) != -1) or did == ('{Entity}')) and isnotempty(sid)
| extend sid = tostring(sid)
| lookup (union isfuzzy=true _GetWatchlist('CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1'), _GetWatchlist        ('CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2')) on sid
| where isnotempty(impact_score)
| distinct impact_score
| sort by impact_score desc

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(uid_s: string, TenantId: string, SourceSystem: string, MG: string, ManagementGroupName: string, Computer: string, RawData: string, _ResourceId: string)[];

union isfuzzy=true
Corelight*, dummy_table
| where uid_s == ('{uid}')
| project-away TenantId, SourceSystem, MG, ManagementGroupName, Computer, RawData, _ResourceId
content.title: All Logs per UID

content.query:

| where uid == ('{uid}')
| project spcap_url

| where uid == ('{uid}')
| extend tunnel_parents = strcat_array(todynamic(tunnel_parents), ", "), suri_ids = strcat_array(todynamic(suri_ids), ", "),
         apps = strcat_array(todynamic(apps), ", "), app = strcat_array(app, ", "), id_orig_h_n_vals = strcat_array(todynamic(id_orig_h_n_vals), ", "),
         id_resp_h_n_vals = strcat_array(todynamic(id_resp_h_n_vals), ", ")

content.json: ## Intel
#### Intel Framework is only available for data extracted by Corelight Sensors (open source Zeek sensors not supported)

parameters.name: IndicatorType
parameters.label: Indicator Type
parameters.query:
corelight_intel
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where isnotempty(category)
| distinct category
| sort by category asc

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.label: Filter (IP, Port, Indicator)
parameters.description: Enter value for ip, port, indicator or type

content.title: Intel Logs Over Time ("Additional Filter", "Indicator Type" filters do not apply)

content.query:
corelight_intel
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' == ('{Filter}') or src == ('{Filter}') or dest == ('{Filter}') or dest_port == ('{Filter}') or seen_indicator == ('{Filter}'))
| where ('*' == ('{IndicatorType}') or category == ('{IndicatorType}'))
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| where isnotempty(category)
| summarize Count = count() by category
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Indicators

content.query:
corelight_intel
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' == ('{Filter}') or src == ('{Filter}') or dest == ('{Filter}') or dest_port == ('{Filter}') or seen_indicator == ('{Filter}'))
| where category == ('{category}')
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| extend sources = strcat_array(todynamic(sources), ","), matched = strcat_array(todynamic(matched), ",")
| project-away $table
content.title: Details for Indicator : {category}

content.query:
corelight_intel
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' == ('{Filter}') or src == ('{Filter}') or dest == ('{Filter}') or dest_port == ('{Filter}') or seen_indicator == ('{Filter}'))
| where ('*' == ('{IndicatorType}') or category == ('{IndicatorType}'))
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| summarize ["Total Events"] = count() by src, dest, dest_port, category, seen_indicator, seen_where
| project-rename ["Source IP"] = src, ["Destination IP"] = dest, Port = dest_port, ["Indicator Type"] = category, Indicator = seen_indicator, Where = seen_where
| top 5 by ["Total Events"]

content.json: ## IP Interrogation
**Corelight data for IP under investigation**

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
corelight_dns, corelight_conn, corelight_http, corelight_files, corelight_smtp, corelight_ssl
| where ('*' == ('{OriginatingIP}') or src == ('{OriginatingIP}') or dest == ('{OriginatingIP}')) and
        ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor})) and
       dest_port !in (80, 8080, 443)
| extend tp = iff(isempty(proto), tostring(toint(dest_port)) , iff(isempty(dest_port), proto , strcat(proto, "/", tostring(toint(dest_port)))))
| where isnotempty(tp)
| summarize Count = count() by tp

parameters.name: Severity
parameters.query:
let SeverityDetails = datatable(
        severity_name: string,
        severity_id: real,
        severity_description: string,
        severity_syslog_definition: string
    )[
        "emergencies",0,"System unstable","LOG_EMERG",
        "alerts",1,"Immediate action needed","LOG_ALERT",
        "critical",2,"Critical conditions","LOG_CRIT",
        "error",3,"Error conditions","LOG_ERR",
        "warnings",4,"Warning conditions","LOG_WARNING",
        "notifications",5,"Normal but significant condition","LOG_NOTICE",
        "informational",6,"Informational messages only","LOG_INFO",
        "debugging",7,"Debugging messages","LOG_DEBUG"
    ];
union SeverityDetails, (corelight_notice
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor})))
| where isnotempty(severity_id)
| distinct severity_id
| lookup SeverityDetails on severity_id
| extend severity_display = iff(isnotempty(severity_name), strcat(severity_name, " (", toint(severity_id), ")"), tostring(toint(severity_id)))
| project severity_id, severity_display
| sort by severity_id asc

This workbook requires you to import two CSV files into specific Watchlists:
1. [**CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1.csv**](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Corelight/Watchlists/Corelight-AggregationsEnrichment/CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1.csv) ->  CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1 Watchlist
2. [**CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2.csv**](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Corelight/Watchlists/Corelight-AggregationsEnrichment/CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2.csv) -> CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2 Watchlist

## Import Process
- Navigate to Microsoft Sentinel
- Access the Watchlists section
- Select the appropriate Watchlist (**CorelightAggregationsEnrichment1** or **CorelightAggregationsEnrichment2**)
- Choose **Update watchlist** -> **Bulk update**
- Upload the corresponding CSV file
- Proceed through **Next: Review + create**
- Finalize by clicking **Update**

Repeat these steps for both Watchlists to ensure all data is properly imported.

parameters.label: Corelight Sensor

| where isnotempty(inference)
| extend inference_concated = iff(isnotempty(name), strcat(name, "(", inference, ")"), inference)
| distinct inference_concated, tostring(inference)
| sort by inference_concated asc
| project inference, inference_concated

content.query:
let interval_in_hrs= datetime_diff('hour', {GlobalTimeRestriction:end}, {GlobalTimeRestriction:start});
let interval_in_days= datetime_diff('day', {GlobalTimeRestriction:end}, {GlobalTimeRestriction:start});
let bin_duration=case(interval_in_hrs<=24, 1h, interval_in_days<=30, 1d, interval_in_days>=31 and interval_in_days<=90, 7d, 31d);

corelight_vpn
| where ('*' == ('{VPN_Sensor}') or sensor_name == ('{VPN_Sensor}')) and
        ('*' == ('{VPNType}') or vpn_type == ('{VPNType}'))
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| mv-expand inference = Inferences
| where isnotempty(inference) and
        ('*' == ('{Inference}') or inference == ('{Inference}'))
| make-series Count = count() default = 0 on TimeGenerated from {GlobalTimeRestriction:start} to {GlobalTimeRestriction:end} step bin_duration by tostring(inference)
content.title: Inferences Over Time

content.query:
corelight_vpn
| where ('*' == ('{VPN_Sensor}') or sensor_name == ('{VPN_Sensor}')) and
        ('*' == ('{VPNType}') or vpn_type == ('{VPNType}')) and
        ('*' == ('{Inference}') or (array_index_of(Inferences, ('{Inference}')) != -1))
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| mv-expand Service = services
| where tostring(Service) startswith "spicy"
| extend Country = geo_info_from_ip_address(id_resp_h).country
| summarize 
    ["Sum of Destination Bytes"] = sum(resp_bytes),
    ["Sum of Source Bytes"] = sum(orig_bytes),
    ["Number of Connections"] = count()
    by id_orig_h, id_resp_h, id_resp_p, proto, tostring(Country), tostring(Service)
| extend Gigabytes = ((["Sum of Source Bytes"] + ["Sum of Destination Bytes"]))
| project ["Source IP"] = id_orig_h, ["Destination IP"] = id_resp_h, ["Destination Port"] = id_resp_p, Protocol = proto,  ["Destination Country"] = tostring(Country), tostring(Service), ["Sum of Destination Bytes"], ["Sum of Source Bytes"], Gigabytes, ["Number of Connections"]
| top 20 by Gigabytes
content.title: Largest Transfers Between Host Pairs Over VPN

content.query:
corelight_vpn

content.query:

| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))
| where ('*' == ('{SSHInferences}') or (array_index_of(InferenceNames, ('{SSHInferences}')) != -1))
| search '{AdditionalFilter}'
| summarize Count = count() by src, dest
| top 5 by Count)
| join kind=leftouter
(corelight_ssh
| where ('*' in ({Sensor}) or sensor_name in ({Sensor}))

| sort by Count desc
